m	Z	
e	d	
fujitsu
Supports Fujitsu compiler function.
This compiler is developed by Fujitsu and is used in A64FX on Fugaku.
	FCompiler
FujitsuFCompilerc
fujitsuz
Fujitsu Fortran CompilerZ
